free_text: The boron consisted of isotopically enriched elemental
boron (>99% 11B) either in the from of self-supporting
foils or in the form of thin layer evaporated onto
thick tantalum backings or onto carbon foils of
6 mu-g/cm2 thickness. The backed targets ranged in
thickness from 1 mu-g/cm2 to 120 mu-g/cm2; the self-
supporting 11B foil targets were typically 30 mu-g/cm2
in thickness, with the thinnest being 22 mu-g/cm2.
by direct normalization to the Rutherford scattering.
SF9=EXP in REACTION code in Subents 002-006 deleted.

* normalization error was added in quadrature to the
* the uncertainty in the effective bombarding energy
